display_information.name: Community Beacon
display_information.description: Makes sure no call for help goes unanswered — detects community needs and offers of help in Slack, matches them, and tracks impact.

assistant_view.assistant_description: I watch community Slack channels for calls for help — food, housing, transport, medical, emotional support — and offers of help, match them to each other, and track impact so no one falls through the cracks.

suggested_prompts.title: How do I scan for needs?
suggested_prompts.message: How do I scan a channel for community needs?

suggested_prompts.title: Show recent needs
suggested_prompts.message: What community needs have been detected recently?

slash_commands.description: Scan this channel for recent community needs and offers of help
List recently detected community needs and offers
